description: Batsman vs bowling style matchup modifiers for T20 tactical system

majorStrength.description: Batsman ranks this bowl style 1-2 (best matchup)

strength.description: Batsman ranks this bowl style 3-4 (good matchup)

weakness.description: Batsman ranks this bowl style 5-6 (poor matchup)

majorWeakness.description: Batsman ranks this bowl style 7-8 (worst matchup)

preferenceGeneration.description: How to generate random 1-8 rankings for batsmen
preferenceGeneration.method: Shuffle array [1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8] and assign to bowlingStyles array in order
